description: Input schema for inverse folding tools (e.g., ProteinMPNN, ESM-IF1).

extra.description: Tool-specific parameters passed through to the container. Keys and values are forwarded as-is into config.json.
extra.title: Extra

structure_path.description: Path to the input backbone structure (PDB or mmCIF).
structure_path.title: Structure Path

chains_to_design.description: Chain IDs to redesign. None designs all chains.
chains_to_design.title: Chains To Design

num_sequences.description: Number of designed sequences to generate.
num_sequences.title: Num Sequences

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Lower values produce more conserved designs.
temperature.title: Temperature

fixed_positions.description: Positions to keep fixed (not redesigned), as a mapping of chain ID to 1-based residue indices.
fixed_positions.title: Fixed Positions

title: InverseFoldingInput
